trace_records_snapshot.content: Add a new desktop thread source kind to the v2 app-server protocol.

content.text: I’ll confirm the generated output and then update the Rust source that owns it.
The TypeScript is generated, so I’m changing the v2 Rust enum instead.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/ThreadSourceKind.ts")
s = p.read_text()
p.write_text(s.replace(' | "unknown";', ' | "desktop" | "unknown";'))
PY

tool_log.command: cd codex-rs && cargo build -p app-server-protocol 2>&1 | tail -5
cd codex-rs && grep -B 5 'pub enum ThreadSourceKind' app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/thread.rs | head -10
cd codex-rs && grep -r 'export.*ts' app-server-protocol/Makefile 2>/dev/null || grep -r 'generate.*ts' app-server-protocol/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null || echo "no makefile found"
